parentAction.completionRule: The exact bounded enumerator is promoted as a finite replay theorem with all-future scope explicit, or a symbolic recurrence/finite Q partition is proved, or a precise blocker names the missing universal source theorem.

theoremObject.scope: Restored finite SIX_PREFIX_NINETEEN through SIX_PREFIX_TWENTY_FOUR family-menu surfaces only.
theoremObject.statement: For each restored finite menu in SIX_PREFIX_NINETEEN through SIX_PREFIX_TWENTY_FOUR, the bounded CRT representative enumerator with left anchors 7,32,57, right anchors 82,132,182, distinct six-square tuple rows, and tie order by representative then stored tupleKey display string exactly reproduces the restored menu after taking the first menu limit rows.
proofInputs: Restored finite menu JSON files under output/frontier-engine-local/p848-anchor-ladder/live-frontier-sync/2026-04-05.

duplicateTiePolicy.rule: Sort by representative ascending, then by the stored tupleKey display string ascending, then take the first menu limit rows.

promotedFiniteClaims: The repo now owns an exact bounded CRT replay theorem for the restored finite menu surfaces.
The finite theorem proves containment of every restored row, no omitted smaller representative, exact order reproduction, and duplicate/equal-representative tie order for the six restored menus.
The one same-boundary extra is not a missing restored row; it sorts after the included boundary row under the recovered tupleKey tie policy and is outside the finite menu limit.
remainingOpen: The original family-menu generator is not restored.
No symbolic all-future relevant-pair recurrence is proved.
No finite Q partition or universal square-witness domain cover is proved.
The contrast-only recombination theorem and post-40500 sufficiency remain open.

deterministicBoundary.blockedInput: A symbolic all-future relevant-pair recurrence, finite Q partition, original generator source theorem, or a proof that the restored finite bounded replay theorem suffices for the universal mod-50 square-witness domain cover.
acceptedSuccessors: Emit a precise all-future recurrence/source blocker naming the missing theorem and residual denominator surface.
Restore or prove the original family-menu generator and compare its ordering/source rule with the bounded replay theorem.
Prove a symbolic relevant-pair recurrence or finite Q partition independent of restored finite snapshots.
Prove contrast-only recombination and post-40500 sufficiency only after the relevant-pair/Q surface is theorem-facing.
deterministicBoundary.forbiddenShortcut: Do not treat the promoted exact finite replay theorem as original generator restoration, universal relevant-pair enumeration, finite Q partition, universal square-witness coverage, p4217 complement coverage, or all-N closure.

nextTheoremMove: Prove a symbolic all-future relevant-pair recurrence or finite Q partition for the mod-50 square-witness domain; if unavailable locally, emit a precise source-theorem blocker at the universal recurrence boundary.
proofBoundary: This packet promotes the exact bounded CRT enumerator as a finite restored-menu replay theorem. It does not restore the original generator, prove a symbolic all-future recurrence, prove a finite Q partition, close contrast-only recombination, justify 40501+ rollout, cover the p4217 complement, or decide Problem 848.
